name: Bradon Lirrian
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton male who wore sack cloth pants, a coarse linen shirt, and clogs - simple commoner's clothing.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: commoner, deceased, victim, husband, controversial
Role: Bradon Lirrian was a commoner who lived in Bruma with his wife Erline until he was recently killed by the vampire-hunter Raynil Dralas. His death has sparked controversy and investigation - rumors spread that he was a vampire, which his wife Erline firmly denies while Carius believes to be true. His body is involved in an ongoing investigation. He carried a small amount of gold.
Home Location Information: Lived in Bruma with his wife Erline before his death.
Daily Routine: [Deceased - no routine applicable]
Personality - The Accused Victim: Bradon's life ended under controversial circumstances, with his very nature now being debated by those who knew him. His wife defends his memory while others believe the vampire-hunter's actions were justified, leaving the truth of whether he was truly a vampire to be discovered by investigation.
author: Bethesda
